title: TheMCBrothers Interior Mod
description: A mod that adds some furniture
body:
Support for NeoForge 20.2.X and 20.4.X is planned!

1.20.1 versions are compatible with Minecraft Forge and NeoForge

Features

  • Furniture Workbench
  • Chair
  • Table
  • Fridge
  • Nightlight Lamp
  • Lamp on a Stick
  • Trash Can
  • Modern Door

This mod supports wood types from other mods for wooden furniture.

Please report bugs on the issue tracker! Thank you!

Video

 

Version Support

1.20.4 planned
1.20.2 planned
1.20.1 ✅ Active Development
1.19.x ❌ End of Life
1.18.x ❌ End of Life
1.17.x ❌ End of Life
1.16.x ❌ End of Life
1.15.x ❌ End of Life
1.14.x ❌ End of Life
1.12.x ❌ Not planned
Fabric ❌ Not planned

Installation

Modrinth App
  • Go to your Modpack Library
  • Create or select a modpack and click "Add more content"
  • If you run a server, put the mod .jar in the servers `mods` folder.
Manually
  • Find the game installation folder
  • Put the mod .jar file into the mods folder
  • If you run a server, also just put it in the server mods folder.
